types.name: Pointer
types.description: Rust raw pointer or reference value.

types.name: #Allocation
types.description: Abstract allocation object maintained by the verifier.

fields.name: layout
fields.description: The original layout associated with this allocation.

fields.name: allocator
fields.description: The allocator identity that created this allocation.

operators.name: get_alloc
operators.description: Returns the abstract allocation object that pointer p is derived from.

operators.name: offset_in_alloc
operators.description: Returns the offset of pointer p relative to the beginning of its allocation.

operators.name: get_field
operators.description: Returns a typed field from an object. Valid fields and return types are defined in types.

operators.name: is_power_of_two
operators.description: Returns whether x is a power of two.

constants.name: USIZE_BITS
constants.description: Number of bits in Rust usize.
